scripts.generate: mkdir -p build && wget -O ./build/openapi.json https://api.eulerstream.com/dashboard/openapi && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./build/openapi.json -g java -o ./src/generated --additional-properties=groupId=io.github.isaackogan,artifactId=euler-api-sdk,apiPackage=io.github.isaackogan.api,modelPackage=io.github.isaackogan.model,invokerPackage=io.github.isaackogan && tsx ./scripts/render-template.ts
